Get in touch
004 — Boring Packages

Proprietary tools.
Production grade.

The software stack powering our pipelines. Built for reliability, validated on real data, and designed to scale from research to the clinic.

bsomics
v0.4.2 · Proprietary

Unified single-cell and bulk multiomics QC, normalization, batch correction, and integration. Scanpy-compatible API with UMAP, PAGA trajectory, and differential expression modules built in.

Python Scanpy AnnData scRNA-seq
bsdock
v0.2.1 · Proprietary

Docking workflow automation — protein prep, grid generation, multi-pose docking, ADMET filtering, and pose clustering. CSV and SDF output ready for downstream scoring pipelines.

Python AutoDock/Vina RDKit ADMET
bsflow
v1.1.0 · Proprietary

Production-ready Nextflow DSL2 modules for WGS, RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, ATAC-seq, and scRNA-seq. GxP-validated, containerized with Docker and Singularity, and tested with nf-test for every commit.

Nextflow nf-core Docker GxP
bsreport
v0.3.0 · Proprietary

Clinical-grade HTML and PDF genomics report generator. ACMG/AMP variant classification, population frequency lookup via gnomAD, pharmacogenomics integration, and fully customizable report templates.

Python ACMG ClinVar PGx
Access & Partnerships

Interested in running our pipelines on your data? We partner with research groups, pharma, and diagnostics labs for pilot engagements.

Get in touch →
On reproducibility

"Every package ships with a test suite, a lockfile, and a container. If it works on our machine, it works on yours — and on the FDA's."

— Boring Science Build Standard
Stop fighting your data. Start doing your science.
Boring Science LLC builds the infrastructure that turns biological noise into structured insight.
